inputs.label: Value
inputs.businessContext: The numerical value in circular mils (or kcmil if scale factor is 1000).

businessContext_i18n.en: The numerical value in circular mils (or kcmil if scale factor is 1000).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dairesel mil (veya ölçek faktörü 1000 ise kcmil) cinsinden sayısal değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der numerische Wert in circular mils (oder kcmil, wenn Skalierungsfaktor 1000).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur numérique en mils circulaires (ou kcmil si le facteur d'échelle est 1000).
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor numérico en mils circulares (o kcmil si el factor de escala es 1000).
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة العددية بالميل الدائري (أو kcmil إذا كان عامل المقياس 1000).

inputs.label: Unit Scale
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 for cmil, 1000 for kcmil.

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 for cmil, 1000 for kcmil.
businessContext_i18n.tr: cmil için 1, kcmil için 1000 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 für cmil, 1000 für kcmil setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réglez sur 1 pour cmil, 1000 pour kcmil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 para cmil, 1000 para kcmil.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اضبط على 1 لـ cmil، 1000 لـ kcmil.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Physical constant: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 sqmm. Do not change unless for verification.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical constant: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 sqmm. Do not change unless for verification.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel sabit: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 mm². Doğrulama dışında değiştirmeyin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Physikalische Konstante: 1 cmil = 0,000506707479 mm². Nur zur Überprüfung ändern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante physique : 1 cmil = 0,000506707479 mm². Ne pas modifier sauf pour vérification.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante física: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 mm². No cambiar a menos que sea para verificación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثابت فيزيائي: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 مم². لا تغيره إلا للتحقق.

inputs.label: Precision (Decimals)
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
